results.title: Waveband Communications, Inc. Details - govtribe.com
excerpts:
This is a delivery order awarded by the U.S. Air Force's Global Strike Command to Waveband Communications, Inc., a small business subchapter S corporation. The order is for "Individual Equipment" and is priced at $4,945.12 on a firm fixed price basis. It was issued under the General Services Administration (GSA) Information Technology Schedule 70 contract vehicle. The equipment, which includes two-way radio accessories such as batteries, headsets, microphones, and antennas, will... * ###### Delivery Order GS35F228BA-HSBP1017F00346

This is a firm fixed-price delivery order awarded to Waveband Communications, Inc. by the U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), a civilian agency, under the General Services Administration (GSA) Information Technology (IT) Schedule 70 contract vehicle. The order is for earphones valued at $19,185.00 and has an ultimate completion date of November 30, 2017. The contract was not set aside for any specific business type.

**Popular Federal Contract Vehicles** * ###### Multiple Award Schedule (MAS)") * ###### Information Technology Schedule 70 (IT-70)") AI Summary Website Twitter Waveband Communications, Inc. is a manufacturer and supplier of two-way radio equipment, batteries, and audio accessories. They provide accessories for brands including Motorola, Harris, Kenwood, and Icom radios to commercial and government clients. Through prime and subcontract awards, Waveband Communications has provided a variety of communications equipment and accessories to Department of Defense and civilian agencies. They were awarded multiple orders from the Army, Navy, Air Force, and Air Combat Command for radio batteries, headsets, microphones, antennas, and related supplies. Waveband also received contracts from DHS, DOI, and GSA for similar radio communication devices and accessories. Many of the awards were set aside for small businesses. The equipment has supported law enforcement, search and rescue, explosive ordnance disposal, base security, and other operations. Waveband has provided this equipment commercially off the GSA Schedule as well as through custom orders. results.title: MAS - Waveband Communications, Inc. - GS35F228BA
excerpts: This is a price list for a federal supply schedule contract held by Waveband Communications, Inc. The contract provides a wide range of communications equipment and accessories, including antennas, cables, connectors, headsets, microphones, and batteries.

results.title: Entity Information - SAM.gov
excerpts:
# Entity Information

We are bringing together entity information in one place, including: Entity Registrations, Exclusions, Disaster Response Registry, and Responsibility/Qualification data.

* [Learn how we are connecting information across SAM.gov](https://www.fsd.gov/gsafsd_sp?id=kb_article_view&sysparm_article=KB0062290)
* [FAPIIS.gov is now Responsibility/Qualification. Learn more.](https://www.fsd.gov/gsafsd_sp?id=kb_article_view&sysparm_article=KB0062291)

### Please Sign In

## Search Entity Information

Dropdown 1 Select Domain... All Entity Information Responsibility/Qualification Disaster Response Registry Entities

Text Field

Show active only

## Register Your Entity or Get a Unique Entity ID

Register your entity or get a Unique Entity ID to get started doing business with the federal government

Get Started

Sign into your entity workspace to renew or update your entity

Renew Entity

Check the status of a recently submitted entity registration or renewal
Check Entity Status

## Additional Free Entity Resources

Image

APEX Accelerators (formerly known as PTACs) are an official government contracting assistance resource for small business. Find your local APEX Accelerators (formerly known as PTACs) to get free help getting started doing business with the federal government.

[APEX Accelerators](https://www.apexaccelerators.us/#/) (formerly known as [PTACs](https://www.aptac-us.org/) )

**Find Small Business Partners**  
The Small Business Administration's (SBA) DSBS can be used to identify potential small business contractors.

[SBA Dynamic Small Business Search (DSBS)](https://dsbs.sba.gov/search/dsp_dsbs.cfm)

**Product and Service Classification**  
Look up classifications for the goods and services your entity provides.

[Product Service Code Manual](https://www.acquisition.gov/psc-manual)  
[North American Industry Classification System (NAICS)](https://www.census.gov/naics/)

**Past Performance**  
Go to CPARS.
gov to evaluate and review contractor past performance (federal users only) or to view your evaluations by the federal government (non-federal users).

[CPARS.gov](https://cpars.gov/)

## Exclusions Resources

* Exclusion Types
* Legacy CT Codes
* Agency Points of Contact

## Integrate With Data Services

**Download Data Files**

Generate and download Entity Extracts, Exclusions Extracts, and Responsibility/Qualification data reports (formerly in fapiis.gov).

* Go to Entity Data Files
* Go to Exclusions Data Files
* Go to Responsibility/Qualification Report

**APIs and System Connections**

Connect your system to APIs for Entity, Exclusions, and Responsibility/Qualification data.

* [Go to the Entity Management API](https://open.gsa.gov/api/entity-api/)
* [Go to the Exclusions API](https://open.gsa.gov/api/exclusions-api/)
* [Go to the Responsibility/Qualification API](https://open.gsa.gov/api/entity-api/)

**Frequently Asked Questions**

Learn more about using SAM.

excerpts:
# SAM.gov | Home

Official U.S. Government Website 100% Free

## The Official U.S. Government System for:

* Contracting Research and engage in federal contracting
* Entity Information View entities doing federal business
* Federal Hierarchy Search the directory of federal organizations

* Federal Assistance Learn about grants and other federal assistance programs
* Entity Reporting Report about federal awards
* Wage Determinations Look up wages and benefit rates for federal awards

Search for Federal Acquisition Supply Chain Security Act orders

View FASCSA Orders

## Already know what you want to find?

Already know what you want to find?

Dropdown 1

Select Domain... Contracting Federal Assistance Entity Information Federal Hierarchy Wage Determinations

Text Field

## Register Your Entity or Get a Unique Entity ID

Register your entity or get a Unique Entity ID to get started doing business with the federal government.

Get Started

Renew Entity

Check Entity Status
## Announcements

Mar 9

Modernized Reps & Certs Coming to SAM.gov on March 24th, 2026

_SAM.gov will release the modernized FAR and DFARS Representations and Certifications on March 24th, 2026. This update streamlines data collection and improves the user experience. For more details on the changes, read our blog._

Feb 25

Contract Awards Data and Searching Now in SAM.gov

_The FPDS.gov "ezSearch" feature has been retired and users should conduct all contract awards data searches in SAM.gov. The FPDS.gov ATOM Feed will be retired later in FY 2026.  For more information regarding the FPDS transition and instructions on searching FPDS data in SAM.gov, please visit sam.go..._

Feb 25

eSRS.gov Has Retired

_The General Services Administration has retired the Electronic Subcontracting Reporting System (eSRS.gov) as part of the ongoing effort to modernize our suite of federal acquisition systems. Subcontracting reporting capabilities are now available in SAM.gov.
For more information, please visit SAM.gov/esr..._

Feb 2

GSA Releases New Federal Assistance Listings API

_GSA recently released a new Federal Assistance Listings API (Application Program Interface) to SAM.gov. Users can use the API to access and consume assistance listings data in bulk. The API also replaces the annual publication of the federal assistance listings catalog in SAM.gov. API specifications are ..._

Oct 3, 2025

Service Contract Reporting for FY25 Starts Oct 3

_The service contract reporting (SCR) period for fiscal year 2025 starts on Oct 3, 2025 and closes on Jan 31, 2026. The SCR feature in SAM.gov allows contractors to submit annual reports on service contract activity, as required under FAR 52.204-14 and FAR 52.204-15._
